title: Advanced Customer Support: Learning and improving from serious cases
body: "After reporting on the wider activities of its Advanced Customer Support Teams in its Annual Report and Accounts, DWP has committed to be more open and transparent about what it learns from serious cases and how it grows as a learning organisation.​​  This publication explains how Internal Process Reviews (IPRs) form a core part of DWP’s overall approach to learning, detailing what was identified from serious cases, and the improvements put in place to deliver change for our customers.  "
